cmparallelpipes.ponder.locked_pipe.text_: Fluid Pipes will always connect to other Fluid Pipes
The pipe wrench can be used to lock the pipe connectivity state similar to Encased Pipe
The Fluid Pipe can be unlocked again with the pipe wrench
cmparallelpipes.ponder.outline_segment.t: Locked pipes will show outlines when holding a pipe wrench
You can configure pipe connections of locked pipes with a pipe wrench
You can add an end point
But remember, a pipe needs at least 2 open endpoints or else you can't remove them.
